title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at JioMart - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at JioMart - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the JioMart family as a Digital Marketing Manager in Ahmedabad. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About JioMart:
JioMart is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with JioMart!
